selected_cases.selection_rule: Minimize transfer time subject to peak target >= 0.99 in the resonant manifold.

transmon_reference.notes: Matched local tomography workflow sharing the same storage/readout frequencies and transmon anharmonicity scale as the sideband-reset example. The sideband-reset device itself does not include transmon coherence values, so this reference is used as an explicitly labeled sensitivity anchor rather than as a claimed ground-truth measurement.
